objectives: Conjugate regular -ar, -er, -ir verbs in the preterite
Use preterite to describe completed past actions

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Sofía
dialogue_blocks.text: ¿Qué hiciste el fin de semana pasado?
dialogue_blocks.translation: What did you do last weekend?
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ke iˈθiste el fin de seˈmana paˈsaðo]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Carlos
dialogue_blocks.text: Visité a mi abuela y comí con toda la familia.
dialogue_blocks.translation: I visited my grandmother and ate with the whole family.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [biˈsite a mi aˈβwela i koˈmi kon ˈtoða la faˈmilja]
alternate_phrasing: Fui a ver a mi abuela

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Sofía
dialogue_blocks.text: ¡Qué bien! Yo salí con unas amigas el sábado.
dialogue_blocks.translation: How nice! I went out with some friends on Saturday.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ke ˈβjen ‖ jo saˈli kon ˈunas aˈmiɣas el ˈsaβaðo]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Sofía
dialogue_blocks.text: Fuimos al cine y después bebimos café en un restaurante.
dialogue_blocks.translation: We went to the movies and afterwards drank coffee at a restaurant.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ˈfwimos al ˈθine i desˈpwes βeˈβimos kaˈfe en un restawˈɾante]

dialogue_blocks.speaker: Sofía
dialogue_blocks.text: Vimos una película de acción. Empezó a las ocho y terminó a las diez.
dialogue_blocks.translation: We saw an action movie. It started at eight and ended at ten.
dialogue_blocks.ipa: [ˈβimos ˈuna peˈlikula ðe akˈθjon ‖ empeˈθo a las ˈoʧo i teɾmiˈno a las ˈðjeθ]

exercises.instruction: Escoge la forma correcta del pretérito (Choose the correct preterite form)
exercises.question: What is the correct preterite form of 'hablar' for 'tú'?

feedback.correct: ¡Correcto! 'Hablaste' is the preterite tú form — used for completed past actions.
feedback.incorrect: The preterite tú form of -ar verbs ends in -aste. 'Hablabas' is imperfect, 'hablás' is voseo present, 'hablarás' is future.

exercises.instruction: Une el infinitivo con su forma en pretérito (yo) (Match infinitive to preterite yo form)
Completa con la forma correcta del pretérito (Complete with the correct preterite form)

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: _____ a la biblioteca y _____ tres horas estudiando. (ir / pasar)

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Sí, _____ con mi compañero de clase. (hablar)

speaking_rubric.title: Cuéntame tu fin de semana (Tell me about your weekend)
speaking_rubric.scenario: Your friend asks what you did last weekend. Describe at least 3 activities using the preterite.
speaking_rubric.prompt: Describe lo que hiciste el fin de semana. Usa el pretérito.

sample_response.text: El sábado pasado fui al gimnasio por la mañana. Después comí con mi familia. Por la noche salí con mis amigos y bailamos en una fiesta.
sample_response.ipa: [el ˈsaβaðo paˈsaðo ˈfwi al xiмˈnasjo ‖ desˈpwes koˈmi kon mi faˈmilja ‖ poɾ la ˈnoʧe saˈli kon mis aˈmiɣos]

cultural_notes.formality: When recounting past events in Mexico, people often use vivid storytelling — adding '¡No manches!' (No way!) or '¡Qué padre!' (How cool!) as reactions.
cultural_notes.gestures: Mexicans often use hand gestures to emphasize stories. Raised eyebrows signal surprise at something that happened.
cultural_notes.regional_variations: In Mexico, the preterite is strongly preferred over the present perfect for recent past. 'Fui al mercado' (I went to the market) is preferred over 'He ido al mercado'.
